mapper.select: SELECT p.perm_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.description, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user_permission up WHERE up.perm_id = p.perm_id) AS holder_count FROM tb_permission p ORDER BY p.perm_id

SELECT p.perm_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.description, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user_permission up WHERE up.perm_id = p.perm_id) AS holder_count FROM tb_permission p WHERE p.perm_id = #{permId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permission (perm_code, perm_name, description) VALUES (#{permCode}, #{permName}, #{description})
